description: Expanded sf-search dashboard with existing pipeline panels plus extra latency, throughput, queue, Qdrant, log, temp-tile, explicit tile embedding throughput, per-tile embedding latency, and optional GPU panels.
title: sf-search Pipeline Expanded

widgets.title: Coverage Totals

widgets.description: Log lines grouped by severity for sf-search services. This uses SigNoz ClickHouse logs schema v2.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
WITH __resource_filter AS (
  SELECT fingerprint
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2_resource
  WHERE simpleJSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') LIKE 'sf-search%'
    AND seen_at_ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
)
SELECT
  now() AS ts,
  if(severity_text = '', 'UNSPECIFIED', severity_text) AS severity,
  toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
WHERE resource_fingerprint GLOBAL IN __resource_filter
  AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano
  AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano
  AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
GROUP BY severity, ts
ORDER BY value DESC

widgets.title: Log Levels

widgets.description: Error and warning log rate by service. This uses SigNoz ClickHouse logs schema v2.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
WITH __resource_filter AS (
  SELECT fingerprint
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2_resource
  WHERE simpleJSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') LIKE 'sf-search%'
    AND seen_at_ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS ts,
  resource.`service.name`::String AS service,
  if(severity_text = '', 'UNSPECIFIED', severity_text) AS severity,
  toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
WHERE resource_fingerprint GLOBAL IN __resource_filter
  AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano
  AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano
  AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
  AND severity_text IN ('ERROR', 'WARN', 'WARNING', 'FATAL')
GROUP BY ts, service, severity
ORDER BY ts ASC

widgets.title: Warn/Error Logs

widgets.description: Log line rate by sf-search service.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
WITH __resource_filter AS (
  SELECT fingerprint
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2_resource
  WHERE simpleJSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') LIKE 'sf-search%'
    AND seen_at_ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS ts,
  resource.`service.name`::String AS service,
  toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
WHERE resource_fingerprint GLOBAL IN __resource_filter
  AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano
  AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano
  AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
GROUP BY ts, service
ORDER BY ts ASC

widgets.title: Logs By Service

widgets.description: Most common warning/error log message bodies during the selected range.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
WITH __resource_filter AS (
  SELECT fingerprint
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2_resource
  WHERE simpleJSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') LIKE 'sf-search%'
    AND seen_at_ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
)
SELECT
  now() AS ts,
  substring(body, 1, 140) AS message,
  toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
WHERE resource_fingerprint GLOBAL IN __resource_filter
  AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano
  AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano
  AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
  AND severity_text IN ('ERROR', 'WARN', 'WARNING', 'FATAL')
GROUP BY message, ts
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Top Warning And Error Messages

widgets.description: Embedding service warning/error log rate.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
WITH __resource_filter AS (
  SELECT fingerprint
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2_resource
  WHERE simpleJSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') LIKE 'sf-search%'
    AND seen_at_ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS ts,
  if(severity_text = '', 'UNSPECIFIED', severity_text) AS severity,
  toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
WHERE resource_fingerprint GLOBAL IN __resource_filter
  AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano
  AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano
  AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
  AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'sf-search-embedding'
  AND severity_text IN ('ERROR', 'WARN', 'WARNING', 'FATAL')
GROUP BY ts, severity
ORDER BY ts ASC

widgets.title: Embedding Error Logs

widgets.description: Processing service warning/error log rate.

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query:
WITH __resource_filter AS (
  SELECT fingerprint
  FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2_resource
  WHERE simpleJSONExtractString(labels, 'service.name') LIKE 'sf-search%'
    AND seen_at_ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS ts,
  if(severity_text = '', 'UNSPECIFIED', severity_text) AS severity,
  toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2
WHERE resource_fingerprint GLOBAL IN __resource_filter
  AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano
  AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano
  AND ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp
  AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'sf-search-processing'
  AND severity_text IN ('ERROR', 'WARN', 'WARNING', 'FATAL')
GROUP BY ts, severity
ORDER BY ts ASC
